cpu_summary: 2022 Alder Lake-UP3 hybrid (2P+8E, 12 threads, 15 W); mainstream business ultrabook CPU; representative of typical 2022-2024 laptops.
quant_kernel_note: AVX-VNNI (vpdpbusd) available: int8 dot products run in 1 instruction per packed pair, giving the textbook 1.5-3x quant speedup over fp16 FMA.
gpu: 00:02.0 VGA compatible controller [0300]: Intel Corporation Alder Lake-UP3 GT2 [Iris Xe Graphics] [8086:46a8] (rev 0c)

toolchain.source: NimbleX system package (built from source tarball)

gpu_build.reason: Intel Iris Xe iGPU present; Vulkan accel build deferred — root squashfs has 8.1 GiB free which is below the cargo-target growth budget for a second feature build
